emotional_tone: Calm, supportive, grounded, and organized. Reducing cognitive load through warm aesthetics.

layout_and_spacing.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 inside cards to avoid text collision with borders
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense text and forms. Dashboard widgets must use h-full to stretch and match neighbors. Mobile-first grid-cols-1.

surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm z-50
surfaces_and_components.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), rounded-2xl, 1px subtle border (#E5E2DC), no shadow. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-stone-300.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Rounded-full or rounded-xl for organic feel. Primary uses #546E58 with white text. High contrast hover states. Always explicitly set hover:text-white.
surfaces_and_components.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn components heavily customized: rounded-xl borders, #F9F8F6 backgrounds, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D97757]. Never use native HTML inputs.
surfaces_and_components.chat_interface: Distinct right sidebar or elevated modal. Chat bubbles: User (Warm Sand #F9F8F6), Agent (Soft Sage #E8EBE4). Input field fixed at bottom.
surfaces_and_components.cook_instructions_card: Highlight visually with a subtle Terracotta border (#D97757/30) and a light warm background to distinguish from general data.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and links must explicitly define text color on hover. Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1).
motion_and_interactions.loading: Organic pulse or subtle blur-in. Avoid harsh spinners.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Focus rings must have high contrast (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D97757]). Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight for high-end look). Provide instructions to yarn add @phosphor-icons/react if used.

images.description: Large modern warm kitchen, perfect for a subtle hero background with an overlay.
images.usage: Use with bg-black/30 or bg-white/40 overlay to ensure text contrast.

images.description: Neatly arranged glass jars in a pantry.
images.usage: Use in the pantry tracker feature highlight or dashboard empty state.

images.description: Family eating indoors, representing the end goal of the product.
images.usage: Use in the 'About' section, family profile setup, or marketing narrative.

media.image_constraints: Mobile height limit: max-h-[80vh]. Never use placeholders.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this file fully before implementation.
Set up Tailwind config with these specific color hexes and font families.
Install 'lucide-react' for icons and 'framer-motion' for subtle lifts and layout transitions.
Implement Shadcn components but override their default styles to match the 'Organic & Earthy' surfaces defined above. Remove the default Vercel-look.
The meal plan dashboard should utilize the 'Control Room' grid (dense but cleanly separated via borders, no heavy shadows).
Use the exact image URLs provided for the landing page or dashboard placeholders. Do NOT use dummyimage.com or via.placeholder.com.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, and links have 'data-testid' applied.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font anywhere for headings.
